description: Composition Black sleeveless pullover made of 100% acrylic, has a mock neck with a full front zipper, ribbed cuffs, collar and hem, grey tipping on the collar and hem, and appliqued branding on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out cold with similar colours at 40 degrees Do not bleach or tumble dry Dry flat in shade Low iron; Do not iron on decorations Dry clean if needed Enjoy the winter in comfort and style in this acrylic pullover from fila. The soft knit fabric traps body heat and keeps you warm and comfortable. Layer this pullover over t-shirts, jeans and sneakers. Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
